samples.text: All dogs are mammals. All mammals are animals. Are dogs animals?
Every member of dogs is among mammals. Every member of mammals is among animals. Does it follow that dogs are animals?
All hounds are vertebrates. All vertebrates are animals. Are hounds animals?
animals include all mammals. mammals include all dogs. Therefore, are dogs animals?
All dogs are mammals. All mammals are animals. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Are dogs animals?
